name: What happens first after I report my work injury in Boise?
description: Employer/insurer files reports within days; you receive copies and start medical benefits.[1][3]

mainEntity.name: What happens first after I report my work injury in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Employer/insurer files reports within days; you receive copies and start medical benefits.[1][3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Your employer files First Report of Injury within 7 days to insurer, who reports to the commission in 14 days; you get copies and rights form.[1][3] Doctor submits initial report in 7 days.[1] Key factors: Report immediately to avoid 60-day Idaho/180-day Utah cutoff; cover medical, lost wages.[3][1] Help fill forms if needed; seek treatment explaining incident.[3] Dispute via commission if denied.[3]
